fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the posted assembly order header that the posted assembly order line refers to.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the posted assembly order line.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the assembly order that the assembly order line refers to.

fields.name: Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the assembly order line that the posted assembly order line originates from.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the posted assembly order line.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the assembly component on the posted assembly line.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the second description of the assembly component on the posted assembly line.

fields.name: Lead-Time Offset
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lead-time offset that is defined for the assembly component on this posted assembly order line.

fields.name: Resource Usage Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the cost of the resource on the posted assembly order line is allocated to the assembly item.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location from which assembly component was consumed.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the bin from which the assembly component was consumed.

fields.name: Position
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first position label that you defined for the item on its assembly BOM.

fields.name: Position 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the second position label that you defined for the item on its assembly BOM.

fields.name: Position 3
fields.tooltip: Specifies the third position label that you defined for the item on its assembly BOM.

fields.name: Item Shpt. Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that is associated with the reversal of the assembly order header during an undo assembly process.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the assembly component were posted as consumed by the posted assembly order line.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many assembly components were posted as consumed by the posted assembly order line. The assembly components are stated in the base unit of measure. The value is copied from the Quantity (Base) field on the assembly order line during posting.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies on which date the assembly component was due to be available for consumption by the posted assembly order. The date is copied from the Due Date field on the assembly order line during posting.

fields.name: Quantity per
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the assembly component are required to assemble one assembly item.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity per unit of measure of the component item on the posted assembly order line.

fields.name: Inventory Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies links between business transactions made for the item and an inventory account in the general ledger, to group amounts for that item type.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the general product posting group to which the assembly component was posted from this posted assembly order line. It is copied from the Gen. Prod. Posting Group field on the assembly order line during posting.
Additional Information
When you post transactions for the item on the assembly order line, this code is used with a posting group code of the General Posting Setup window. The window defines the VAT rate, the VAT calculation type, and the accounts in which postings for sales, discounts, and so on occur.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the General Business Posting Group that applies to the entry.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Cost Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of the posted assembly order line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.
